zh.lifeSummary: 當Berenger de Millau於1020年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯洛斯時，他的父親Richard II de Rodez18歲，母親Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE15歲。他於大約1050年與Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1080年4月12日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berenger de Millau于1020年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯洛斯时，他的父亲Richard II de Rodez18岁，母亲Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE15岁。他于大约1050年与Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1080年4月12日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Millau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Berenger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beringer
meanings: German; French (Béringer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Beringari, Beringer, composed of the elements bern ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’. Compare French Belanger and Berenger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of several paces called Behringen or Böhringen in Baden-Württemberg and Bayern. Compare   Baringer  ,   Behringer  ,   Berringer  , and   Boehringer  .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  .

variants.name: Berenguer
meanings: Spanish and French (southern; Bérenguer): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements ber ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’, a cognate of French Bérenger (see Berenger ) and Béringer (see Beringer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Berenger de Millau was born in 1020, in Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Richard II de Rodez, was 18 and his mother, Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, was 15. He married Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat about 1050, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 12 April 1080, in Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berenger de Millau est né en 1020, à Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Richard II de Rodez, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat environ 1050, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1080, à Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berenger de Millau 1020 in Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard II de Rodez 18 und seine Mutter Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE 15. Er hat um 1050 in Frankreich Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 12. April 1080 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berenger de Millau è nato il nel 1020 nel Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Richard II de Rodez, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat circa 1050, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 12 aprile 1080, nel Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Berenger de Millauが1020年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンプイルeンeエス-オリーンタレスロドeスで生まれた時，父Richard II de Rodezは18歳，母Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNEは15歳であった。約1050年にフランスでAdèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1080年4月12日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Berenger de Millau(이)가 1020년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 p이ee스-리탤스 로드e스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard II de Rodez(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1050년 프랑스에서 Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1080년 4월 12일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-프로븐스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berenger de Millau nasceu em 1020, em Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Richard II de Rodez, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat aproximadamente 1050, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1080, em Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berenger de Millau родился в 1020 г. в местности родeс, пирeнeес-ориентеилесь, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard II de Rodez было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat около 1050 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 12 апреля 1080 г. в местности алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.from 1060 to 1071: mai le 1060 e o'o I le 1071

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berenger de Millau nació en 1020, en Rodès, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Richard II de Rodez, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Rixinde Richisindis DE NARBONNE, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat aproximadamente 1050, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 12 de abril de 1080, en Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
